author: Shadcodez
install_msg: PixelArt cog installed! Use `[p]pixel` with an image to create pixel art.
name: pixelart
short: Convert images to pixel art with customizable styles and palettes.
description: A cog that converts images to pixel art. Attach an image, provide a URL, or reply to an image message, then tweak scale, palette, and grayscale interactively.
end_user_data_statement: This cog does not store any end user data.
